dashboard.description: Check out what's popular, vote on requests, and discover what's rising.

continueVoting.defaultDescription: Your next voting pick is ready. Jump back into the stack and keep shaping what lands in your library.

votingComplete.title: No more picks in the voting queue.
votingComplete.description: You have already voted through the current stack. Browse the catalog to find something to watch while new voting candidates build up.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your default language and region preferences for new browse and vote sessions.
settings.contentLanguageDescription: Language used for movie and TV titles, overviews, and posters from TMDB.
settings.uiLanguageDescription: Language of the Findarr application interface.
settings.votingRangeDescription: How many of the top-ranked titles are available to vote on.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Configure TMDB, Jellyfin, Plex, Radarr, and Sonarr for discovery and automatic media management.

complete.title: All done
complete.message: You have voted on every item in your current range. Increase your voting range in settings to vote on more.

schedulers.title: Schedulers
schedulers.description: Monitor recurring jobs and trigger them manually when needed.

activity.title: Your Activity
activity.description: Review your votes, requested media, and anything that still needs attention.
activity.emptyMessage: You have not voted on any media yet. Start exploring and your personal request activity will show up here.

filter.allDesc: Show everything you have voted on.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage access, roles, and invitations for people using Findarr.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

explore.description: Browse what is trending, search your next watch, and vote on what should be requested.

interactionFilter.allDesc: Mix together titles you have and have not voted on.
interactionFilter.unvotedDesc: Keep the feed focused on titles you still need to rate.
interactionFilter.votedDesc: Review titles you already liked or disliked.

ownerSetup.title: Create admin account
ownerSetup.description: Set up the first Findarr user. This account will manage users and integrations.
ownerSetup.error: Could not create the admin account. Please check the details and try again.

tmdbSetup.title: Connect TMDB
tmdbSetup.disclaimer: This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
tmdbSetup.description: Finish the initial Findarr setup by adding a TMDB read access token. This enables search, discovery, and full media metadata throughout the app.
tmdbSetup.instructions: Sign in or create an account at
tmdbSetup.instructionsAfterLink: , then open the following section in your account:
tmdbSetup.instructionsCopy: Copy that value and paste it into the field below.
tmdbSetup.saveError: Failed to save and test the TMDB access token
tmdbSetup.success: Connection successful. Findarr is ready to continue.
tmdbSetup.error: Could not reach TMDB. Check the access token and try again.

integrationCard.secretAlreadySet: already set — leave blank to keep
integrationCard.disabled: Integration disabled. Toggle the switch to re-enable.

tmdb.description: Metadata provider for search, discovery, and media details.
tmdb.stepMessage: Save the TMDB access token before testing the connection.
tmdb.error: Could not reach TMDB. Save a valid access token, then test again.

credentials.stepMessage: Save the server URL and API key before testing the connection.

arr.step2Message: Choose the quality profile and root folder for new requests.
arr.availableAfterTest: Available after a successful connection test.
arr.success: Connection successful. Quality profiles and root folders are ready.
arr.error: Could not reach {{title}}. Check the URL and API key, then test again.

jellyfin.error: Could not reach Jellyfin. Check the URL and API key, then test again.

plex.error: Could not reach Plex. Check the URL and token, then test again.

regions.label: Content Regions
regions.westernDesc: English-speaking countries, Western Europe, and Nordic countries (US, UK, Germany, France, etc.)
regions.easternEuropeDesc: Eastern European countries including Russia, Poland, Czech Republic, and Baltic states
regions.asianDesc: All Asian countries including Japan, Korea, China, India, Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines, etc.
regions.latinAmericaDesc: Latin American countries including Mexico, Brazil, Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Peru, etc.
regions.middleEastAfricaDesc: Middle Eastern and African countries including Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Egypt, Nigeria, Kenya, etc.
